title: Last Will and Testament
description: A document setting out how a person's estate and affairs should be handled after their death, including asset distribution and executor appointment.
disclaimer: This is a generic template provided for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for advice from a licensed attorney. Wills typically have strict execution requirements (e.g. witnesses, notarization) that vary by jurisdiction.

fields.label: Beneficiaries and Bequests
fields.placeholder: My spouse, John Smith, shall receive my entire estate.

body:
LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT

I, {{testator_name}}, residing at {{testator_address}}, being of sound mind, do hereby declare this to be my Last Will and Testament, revoking all prior wills and codicils.

1. EXECUTOR. I appoint {{executor_name}}, residing at {{executor_address}}, as the Executor of this Will.

2. DISTRIBUTION OF ESTATE. I direct that my estate be distributed as follows: {{beneficiaries}}.

3. GUARDIANSHIP. In the event I have minor children at the time of my death, I appoint {{guardian_name}} as guardian.

4. GOVERNING LAW. This Will shall be governed by the laws of {{governing_state}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed this Will on {{execution_date}}, in the presence of the witnesses below.

_______________________________
{{testator_name}} (Testator)

Witness 1: _______________________________

Witness 2: _______________________________
